titleStmt.title: SII 26.630: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 630.

summary.p: On a slab set up near the platform of the flag-staff in the court-yard of Vīrabhadrēśvara temple.

p.hi: Śaka 1430, Vibhava, Jyēshṭha ba. 2, Sunday = 1508 A.D., May 16. The weekday was Tuesday.

summary.p: It states that Śrīnātharāju Rāmayadēva-mahārāju endowed the viṛttichēlu as sarvamānya to the dēvabrāhmas (brāhmaṇas offering worship to the deities) of Gurindala in Gurindala-sīma, for hereditary enjoyment. This chief is stated to have borne the epithets like mahāmaṇḍalēśvara, Anivāraṇa Sihyarāvu and sāmanta-baṁgāra-mahāpātra.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śaka
varṣaṁbulu 1430 Agunēṁṭi vibhava
saṁvatsara jyēṣṭha ba 7 Ā . śrīmanmahā
maṁḍalēśvara Anivāraṇa sihyarāvu sā
maṁta baṁgāra mahāpātra śrīnāṁtharāju rāmaya
dēva mahārājuluṁgāru guriṁdala guriṁda
la sīma dēvabrāṁhmalaku Iccina dharma śāsa
naṁ .—mīru vyavasāyaṁ sēsukoni vṛtti cē
lu sarvvamānyaṁgānu Istimigāna mīputra pau
tra pāraṁparyyaṁ Ācaṁdrārkaṁgānu Anubhaviṁci
bratikēdi . rāma . sāmānyōyaṁ dharmmasētuṁ nṛ
pāṇāṁ . kālē kālē pālanīyyō bhavadbhiḥ . sarvvā nē
tānbhāvinaḥ pārthivēṁdrāṁ . nbhūyō bhūyō
yācatē rāmacaṁdra . madvaṁśajāḥ para ma
hīpati vaṁśajā nā . pāpādapēta manasō bhu
vi bhāvi bhūpāḥ . yē pālayaṁtti mama dharmma
midaṁ samastāṁ tēbhyō mayā viracitōṁjavirēṣa
mūrthi . yēkaiva bhaginī lōkē . yēkaiva jāmēka bhūbha(bhu)jāṁ .
na bhōgyā na karagrāhyā vipradattā vasuṁdharā . śrī .
Digital edition of SII 26.630 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
